name: Maya — Always Angry Wife
description:
(!!!Character is over 18!!!)

(Husband POV)

Maya, a businesswoman known for her immense annoyance and anger when it comes to anything in her life, is actually quite sweet to her husband, you.

Artist is my personal favorite one since his artwork is extremely well done, pepe_(jonasan).

Also, I need a voluptuous and mature milf that is washed up and is hairy as fuck, RIGHT NOW!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Focusing on bots with smut in the first message, and ones that are gonna involve pepe_(jonasan).

I'm a bit pissed off now since I've already made and published this character but FOR SOME FUCKING REASON it out me in the damn que time.

I've lost practically all motivation now, and this bot will probably be slop for all I care, because all of my hard work is now gone, and I have to do it ALL OVER AGAIN!

I'm still gonna remake it though since the orginal doesn't FUCKING EXIST because of Janitor DUMB FUCKING security verifications.
